column1: No, it is not right that such a speech be rewarded so little.  It should be twenty centimes less.

column1: Twenty centimes??  Do you wish to simply give away our food?  Five centimes!
column2: Twenty centimes??  Do you wish to simply give away our food?  Five centimes!

column1: Ten centimes for such a hero.
column2: Ten centimes for such a hero.

column1: Very well.  For you we will make a special price.  It will cost you ten centimes less than our normal price.
column2: Very well.  For you we will make a special price.  It will cost you ten centimes less than our normal price.

column1: A Falafel is pita bread stuffed with spicy roasted lamb.  A hearty meal.
column2: A Falafel is pita bread stuffed with spicy roasted lamb.  A hearty meal.

column1: The price is but 70 centimes for such a delicacy.
column2: The price is but 70 centimes for such a delicacy.

column1: It is only 30 centimes.
column2: It is only 30 centimes.

column1: Our fresh dates are stuffed with the finest of almonds, roasted over the brazier carefully and then glazed in honey.  We personally stuff the dates ourselves.
column2: Our fresh dates are stuffed with the finest of almonds, roasted over the brazier carefully and then glazed in honey.  We personally stuff the dates ourselves.

column1: For two handsful, you need pay only thirty centimes.
column2: For two handsful, you need pay only thirty centimes.

column1: The saurus meat is first dipped in spicy paprika.
column2: The saurus meat is first dipped in spicy paprika.

column1: This will cost but 70 centimes.
column2: This will cost but 70 centimes.

column1: You can get five meals for but a dinar.
column2: You can get five meals for but a dinar.

column2: Every Hero has a need for belts and boots and waterskins.  May it be that I sell you something, and I shall be most pleased to serve you.

column1: My waterskins can not be filled today, for the very fountain is beset with an elemental of water, and no one can get even a drink.
column2: My waterskins can not be filled today, for the very fountain is beset with an elemental of water, and no one can get even a drink.

column1: The belts and boots are cut and shaped for the customer and take about a week to create.
column2: The belts and boots are cut and shaped for the customer and take about a week to create.

column1: The waterskin will hold enough water for a day's journey in the desert.  It can be refilled in the fountain.  It is often the only thing between a traveler and certain death when one explores around the city.  It will cost you but one dinar.
column2: The waterskin will hold enough water for a day's journey in the desert.  It can be refilled in the fountain.  It is often the only thing between a traveler and certain death when one explores around the city.  It will cost you but one dinar.

column2: See how fine my clothes look upon you!  Make sure all who ask about what you wear know that I, Kiram the Cloth Merchant, made them for you!

column2: My aunt, Toshar the potter, was nearly caught by the Elemental which now inhabits the fountain!

column2: My cousin, Sashanan the Jeweler, has something from the Katta for you!  Seek his stand in the Plaza of the Palace.

column1: The bags I have are woven so fine they can carry the sand and plaster used to repair the city walls, yet strong enough that they will not break under so much weight.  They cost but fifty centimes.
column2: The bags I have are woven so fine they can carry the sand and plaster used to repair the city walls, yet strong enough that they will not break under so much weight.  They cost but fifty centimes.

column1: We only accept Raseirian coin here, Foreigner.

column1: There is one prerequisite.  You need a drink.
column2: There is one prerequisite.  You need a drink.

column1: You only have water.

column2: You have only a cup of coffee.

column1: You have a Djinn Sling, remember?

column2: Through the haze of smoke, you see a place that reminds you a bit of a dream which turned into a nightmare.

column2: The person glares at you, then glances nervously over at Signor Ferrari.

column1: You'll have to sit down before you get up.
column2: You'll have to sit down before you get up.

column1: Great idea!  You'll need a drink, though.
column2: Great idea!  You'll need a drink, though.

column2: If you wish to buy a drink you must go talk to Wilmer.

column1: I should like to speak with you tomorrow about the use of your skills.  As head of all illegal activity in Raseir, I am an influential and respected man, and I have no intention of letting an amateur jeopardize my position, if you understand my meaning.  Good night, for now.
column2: I should like to speak with you tomorrow about the use of your skills.  As head of all illegal activity in Raseir, I am an influential and respected man, and I have no intention of letting an amateur jeopardize my position, if you understand my meaning.  Good night, for now.

column2: You see several guards burst into the inn.

column1: You follow the guard through the dark streets, past the gates of the palace, and into the dungeon of Raseir.
column2: You follow the guard through the dark streets, past the gates of the palace, and into the dungeon of Raseir.

column1: You should hurry.  There is little time.
column2: You should hurry.  There is little time.

column1: I do what I can to help those poor unfortunates who live around here.  Water is my speciality.
column2: I do what I can to help those poor unfortunates who live around here.  Water is my speciality.

column1: About that one, I can say no more.  it is said that the whisper of his name will draw his attention.  I have no wish for him to notice me.
column2: About that one, I can say no more.  it is said that the whisper of his name will draw his attention.  I have no wish for him to notice me.

column1: It is said that, ah, someone, is waiting for someone to open a door to something.  I have had no desire to learn more about it.  Things dealing with magic are best left alone.
column2: It is said that, ah, someone, is waiting for someone to open a door to something.  I have had no desire to learn more about it.  Things dealing with magic are best left alone.

column2: It is said that the only way to leave Raseir's dungeon is to die.

column1: it would be hard for someone such as myself to make a living there, so I have heard.  There are so few laws to work around.
column2: it would be hard for someone such as myself to make a living there, so I have heard.  There are so few laws to work around.

column1: There is much profit to be made here if a man keeps his eyes open for opportunity.
column2: There is much profit to be made here if a man keeps his eyes open for opportunity.

column1: The new emir is as big a fool as his brother was.  I have heard that he hides in the palace and will not leave his room.
column2: The new emir is as big a fool as his brother was.  I have heard that he hides in the palace and will not leave his room.

column1: The palace of Raseir is very lovely and dangerous.  All the wealth of Raseir remains there, and all the dungeons as well.
column2: The palace of Raseir is very lovely and dangerous.  All the wealth of Raseir remains there, and all the dungeons as well.

column1: There was one katta that remained behind when the others left.  I have heard that he went into hiding, but no one has seen him since.
column2: There was one katta that remained behind when the others left.  I have heard that he went into hiding, but no one has seen him since.

column1: My water will cost you 20 dinars, Sir.
column2: My water will cost you 20 dinars, Sir.

column1: Normally my water costs 20 dinars, Sir, but for you I will only require 15.
column2: Normally my water costs 20 dinars, Sir, but for you I will only require 15.

column1: Surely, a man such as yourself can easily afford 20 dinars?
column2: Surely, a man such as yourself can easily afford 20 dinars?

column1: I am sorry, Sir, but I do not accept foreign coin.
column2: I am sorry, Sir, but I do not accept foreign coin.

column1: Surely, Sir, you did not intend to buy water with your good looks?
column2: Surely, Sir, you did not intend to buy water with your good looks?

column2: When it gets dark outside, the guards patrol the city in search of fools to feed the dungeon.

column1: We will reserve a room here for you tonight.  You will need to return here before dark, for it is forbidden to be out at night.  Join me this evening and we will talk some more.  I have some information which may prove useful to you.  I will see you later.  I have some thinking to do now.
column2: We will reserve a room here for you tonight.  You will need to return here before dark, for it is forbidden to be out at night.  Join me this evening and we will talk some more.  I have some information which may prove useful to you.  I will see you later.  I have some thinking to do now.

column1: You have nothing to drink.
column2: You have nothing to drink.

column2: The drink you ordered resembles nothing you've dared to drink in the past.  Therefore, it must be a Djinn Sling.

column1: The cup of black liquid before you more resembles coffee than a Djinn Sling.  Come to think of it, you did order coffee.
column2: The cup of black liquid before you more resembles coffee than a Djinn Sling.  Come to think of it, you did order coffee.

column1: You don't have one of those, but you pick up the glass in front of you.
column2: You don't have one of those, but you pick up the glass in front of you.

column1: Have patience!  The bartender doesn't seem too interested in moving quickly.

column1: It looks more like a Djinn Sling.
column2: It looks more like a Djinn Sling.

column1: It looks more like coffee.
column2: It looks more like coffee.

column1: You start to feel a bit dizzy.  Signor Ferrari smiles at you and starts to ask questions about yourself.  You find yourself answering, telling your friend all about your adventures.  He is particularly interested in Shapeir, and questions you thoroughly.  After a while, though, you start to get a headache.  Ferrari frowns.
column2: You start to feel a bit dizzy.  Signor Ferrari smiles at you and starts to ask questions about yourself.  You find yourself answering, telling your friend all about your adventures.  He is particularly interested in Shapeir, and questions you thoroughly.  After a while, though, you start to get a headache.  Ferrari frowns.

column1: You have led a most interesting and charmed life, it seems.  But it would take a miracle to restore Raseir, and Khaveen has outlawed miracles.  You are very dangerous to me, for your actions will have serious repercussions.  Nevertheless, you may have your uses.
column2: You have led a most interesting and charmed life, it seems.  But it would take a miracle to restore Raseir, and Khaveen has outlawed miracles.  You are very dangerous to me, for your actions will have serious repercussions.  Nevertheless, you may have your uses.

column1: Ugarte, here, provides an invaluable service to this community.  He obtains for others things which are otherwise unattainable.
column2: Ugarte, here, provides an invaluable service to this community.  He obtains for others things which are otherwise unattainable.

column1: Well, seeing as you are a hero and all, perhaps we could settle for say, 3 dinars?
column2: Well, seeing as you are a hero and all, perhaps we could settle for say, 3 dinars?

column1: Well, what kind of hero are you?  You come into town acting like you are a wealthy man, and make poor honest businessmen such as myself work for nothing.
column2: Well, what kind of hero are you?  You come into town acting like you are a wealthy man, and make poor honest businessmen such as myself work for nothing.

column1: There is the little matter of a prophecy to be fulfilled and this one may be the one.
column2: There is the little matter of a prophecy to be fulfilled and this one may be the one.

column1: Of all the djinn joints in all the world, you had to walk into this one.
column2: Of all the djinn joints in all the world, you had to walk into this one.

column2: A hush comes over the bar as people notice you and eye you sullenly.

column1: Come here, stranger.  I see you have already made the acquaintance of Khaveen, our illustrious Captain of the Raseirian Guard, so perhaps you already have an idea of Raseirian hospitality.  Come here, sit down, and let us have a little chat, you and I.
column2: Come here, stranger.  I see you have already made the acquaintance of Khaveen, our illustrious Captain of the Raseirian Guard, so perhaps you already have an idea of Raseirian hospitality.  Come here, sit down, and let us have a little chat, you and I.

column1: No?  No?  What do you mean, "No?"
column2: No?  No?  What do you mean, "No?"

column1: You are led out of the Blue Parrot, where you are quickly arrested for vagrancy.  You spend a long while in Khaveen's dungeon, after all.
column2: You are led out of the Blue Parrot, where you are quickly arrested for vagrancy.  You spend a long while in Khaveen's dungeon, after all.

column1: Ferrari is fat, but his patience is thin.  Your delay has cost you his hospitality.  Without a place to spend the night you are arrested for vagrancy and thrown into Khaveen's dungeons.
column2: Ferrari is fat, but his patience is thin.  Your delay has cost you his hospitality.  Without a place to spend the night you are arrested for vagrancy and thrown into Khaveen's dungeons.

column1: As you leave the room, you watch the jovial expression harden to a glare.  It is obvious that Signor Ferrari is not used to being ignored.  You also find that you are no longer welcome at the Blue Parrot Inn.  Since you have no place to spend the night, you are soon arrested for vagrancy.  It is hard to be a hero in the bottom of a dungeon.
column2: As you leave the room, you watch the jovial expression harden to a glare.  It is obvious that Signor Ferrari is not used to being ignored. column1: Ferrari looks at you, his eyes glinting with malign greed.  He says he will not be thwarted by some half-baked hero.  Suddenly you feel something behind you and find Wilmer grinning with two thin daggers against your back.  The last words you hear are "The Falcon.  I finally have the Falcon."
column2: Ferrari looks at you, his eyes glinting with malign greed.  He says he will not be thwarted by some half-baked hero. column1: When Signor Ferrari realizes that in fact you do not have the black Falcon, he frowns and motions quickly to Wilmer.  Before you can turn, you hear the characteristic "thuk" of a knife imbedding itself into a back.  Your back.
column2: When Signor Ferrari realizes that in fact you do not have the black Falcon, he frowns and motions quickly to Wilmer.  Before you can turn, you hear the characteristic "thuk" of a knife imbedding itself into a back.  Your back.
